title: Campbell’s Snacks Route, Bartlesville, OK
supportTraining: Company in market support available. Company routes require the buyer to form some type of entity such as an LLC or Corporation. If you need help with this visit https://www.routesforsale.net/incorporate.html
description:
Pepperidge Farm Cookie and Snyder’s – Lance Chips Combo route for sale in the Bartlesville, Oklahoma area for $185,620. Financing available with an estimated $18,562 down. Currently grossing $488,124 in sales and nets $74,082. Distributorship and protected territory are purchased through seller and contracted through Campbell’s Snacks. Campbell’s Snacks currently distributes the well-known brands of Goldfish Crackers, Milano Cookies, Snyder’s Pretzels, Lance Crackers, Kettle Chips, Archway Cookies, Cape Cod Chips and more. This route has 11 grocery and variety store accounts. Plenty of growth opportunities.

Ad#:2471053
